playbook.intent: Misaligned stakeholders -> aligned + decisions extracted + scope creep parked.
playbook.scope: Designer runs a 1-hour walkthrough with non-designer stakeholders. Covers context, journey, prototype demo, decision extraction, and scope creep parking. Done when decisions are captured and follow-ups assigned.

success-criteria.criterion: Stakeholders restate the journey in their own words
Decisions captured in writing during the session
Scope creep items parked with rationale
Follow-ups assigned with owners + due dates

stage.name: Open with context
stage.intent: Stakeholders need the why before the what.

tasks.task: Show the journey at a high level

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when stakeholders can restate the user problem.

stage.name: Walkthrough
stage.intent: Walk the prototype, not the pixels.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only when stakeholders followed the walkthrough.

stage.name: Extract decisions

tasks.task: For each: decide, defer, or park

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when every open question has a status.

stage.name: Park scope creep
stage.intent: Big new ideas go to the park, not the sprint.

tasks.task: Tie parks to roadmap or next research cycle
Assign follow-ups with owners + due dates

extra.value: [Walking pixels not the journey -> stakeholders lose context, No park list -> scope creep enters the sprint, No written summary -> decisions evaporate]
['Did stakeholders restate the journey?', 'Are parks tied to the roadmap?', 'Was the summary sent same day?']

{human: faion get-content stakeholder-design-walkthrough-1hr --format md, agent: faion get-content stakeholder-design-walkthrough-1hr --format context, json: faion get-content stakeholder-design-walkthrough-1hr --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft from F-059-063 chunk-05.}]
